languages.text: "Прежде всего позвольте выразить признательность за то, что разрешили мне установить раненому кортикальный имплант. Благодаря вашей милости еще один человек смог продолжить свое служение {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Богу-Императору{/g}". {n}Вивисектор сотворяет руками аквилу и кланяется вам снова, еще ниже, чем прежде.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Прежде всего позвольте выразить признательность за то, что разрешили мне установить раненому кортикальный имплант. Благодаря вашей милости еще один человек смог продолжить свое служение {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Богу-Императору{/g}". {n}Вивисектор сотворяет руками аквилу и кланяется вам снова, еще ниже, чем прежде.{/n}

languages.text: "First of all, allow me to express my gratitude for permitting me to place a cortical implant in the injured man. Thanks to your mercy, one more person has been able to continue his service to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}." {n}The Vivisector makes the sign of the Aquila with his hands and bows to you again, even more deeply than before.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Прежде всего позвольте выразить признательность за то, что разрешили мне установить раненому кортикальный имплант. Thanks to your mercy, one more person has been able to continue his service to the God-Emperor." {n}The Vivisector makes the sign of the Aquila with his hands and bows to you again, even more deeply than before.{/n}

"First of all, allow me to express my gratitude for permitting me to place a cortical implant in the injured man. Thanks to your mercy, one more person has been able to continue his service to the God-Emperor." {n}The Vivisector makes the sign of the Aquila with his hands and bows to you again, even more deeply than before.{/n}

languages.text: 「まず、怪我をした男に脳のインプラントを埋めさせてくれたことに感謝いたします。御慈悲のおかげで、もう一人の者が皇帝陛下に仕えることができたのです」{n}解剖師は両手をアクィラの印にして、さらに深く頭を下げます。{/n}
languages.original_text: "First of all, allow me to express my gratitude for permitting me to place a cortical implant in the injured man. Thanks to your mercy, one more person has been able to continue his service to the God-Emperor." {n}The Vivisector makes the sign of the Aquila with his hands and bows to you again, even more deeply than before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「まず、怪我をした男に脳のインプラントを埋めさせてくれたことに感謝いたします。御慈悲のおかげで、もう一人の者が皇帝陛下に仕えることができたのです。」{n}解剖師は両手を Aquila の印にして、さらに深く頭を下げます。{/n}

languages.text: "Öncelikle yaralı adama zihinsel implant yerleştirmeme izin verdiğiniz için minnettarlığımı ifade etmeme müsaade edin. Merhametiniz sayesinde bir kişi daha {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'a{/g} hizmetine devam edebildi." {n}Dirikesimci, elleriyle Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıyor ve öncekinden daha da aşağıya ulaşır şekilde önünde eğiliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "First of all, allow me to express my gratitude for permitting me to place a cortical implant in the injured man. Thanks to your mercy, one more person has been able to continue his service to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}." {n}The Vivisector makes the sign of the Aquila with his hands and bows to you again, even more deeply than before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Öncelikle yaralı adama zihinsel implant yerleştirmeme izin verdiğiniz için minnettarlığımı ifade etmeme müsaade edin. Merhametiniz sayesinde bir kişi daha {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'a{/g} hizmetine devam edebildi." {n}Dirikesimci, elleriyle Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıyor ve öncekinden daha da aşağıya ulaşır şekilde önünde eğiliyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Antes de nada, deje que exprese mi gratitud por permitirme instalarle el implante cortical al hombre herido. Gracias a su piedad, una persona ha podido continuar con su servicio al {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}». {n}El vivisector hace el signo del Aquila con las manos y vuelve a inclinarse hacia ti en una reverencia aún más profunda.{/n}
languages.original_text: "First of all, allow me to express my gratitude for permitting me to place a cortical implant in the injured man. Thanks to your mercy, one more person has been able to continue his service to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}." {n}The Vivisector makes the sign of the Aquila with his hands and bows to you again, even more deeply than before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Antes de nada, deje que exprese mi gratitud por permitirme instalarle el implante cortical al hombre herido. Gracias a su piedad, una persona ha podido continuar con su servicio al {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}». {n}El vivisector hace el signo del Aquila con las manos y vuelve a inclinarse hacia ti en una reverencia aún más profunda.{/n}

languages.text: “首先，请允许我表达我的感激之情，感谢您允许我为那个伤者植入皮层植入物。多亏了您的仁慈，又有一个人能够继续为{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}效力了。”{n}解剖者做出双头鹰手势，再次向你鞠躬，比之前更深。{/n}
languages.original_text: "First of all, allow me to express my gratitude for permitting me to place a cortical implant in the injured man. Thanks to your mercy, one more person has been able to continue his service to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}." {n}The Vivisector makes the sign of the Aquila with his hands and bows to you again, even more deeply than before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “首先，请允许我表达我的感激之情，感谢您允许我为那个伤者植入皮层植入物。多亏了您的仁慈，又有一个人能够继续为{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}效力了。”{n}解剖者做出双头鹰手势，再次向你鞠躬，比之前更深。{/n}

languages.text: « Avant tout, je tiens à vous remercier de m'avoir autorisé à doter le blessé d'un implant cortical. Grâce à votre clémence, une personne de plus peut continuer à servir l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}. » {n}Le vivisecteur fait le signe de l'Aquila et s'incline à nouveau, encore plus bas qu'avant.{/n}
languages.original_text: "First of all, allow me to express my gratitude for permitting me to place a cortical implant in the injured man. Thanks to your mercy, one more person has been able to continue his service to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}." {n}The Vivisector makes the sign of the Aquila with his hands and bows to you again, even more deeply than before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Avant tout, je tiens à vous remercier de m'avoir autorisé à doter le blessé d'un implant cortical. Grâce à votre clémence, une personne de plus peut continuer à servir l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}. » {n}Le vivisecteur fait le signe de l'Aquila et s'incline à nouveau, encore plus bas qu'avant.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich möchte Euch zuerst meine Dankbarkeit dafür aussprechen, dass Ihr mir gestattet habt, dem verletzten Mann ein kortikales Implantat zu geben. Danke Eurer Gnade kann nun eine weitere Person ihre Dienste für den {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} fortsetzen." {n}Der Vivisektor macht mit seinen Händen das Zeichen des Adlers und verbeugt sich erneut vor dir, noch tiefer als zuvor.{/n}
